chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No. 681 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Main Case 13.12.2023: Mr. Rana Muhammad Arshad Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Talib Ali Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh SIP Shaikh Tahir Hussain P.S. Aziz Bhatti.-.-.-.-.-. Process issued for service upon the private respondents returned unserved as per report submitted on behalf of the SHO P.S. Aziz Bhatti. I have heard the learned counsel for the Applicant and the Learned Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh and perused the record. Applicant can provide information of any offence, which he believes to be correct, to the police station having the requisite jurisdiction in the matter. The Applicant will be heard in a professional and polite manner by the SHO. It will be the primary duty of the police to determine whether the information provided discloses the commission of an offence or not, if the information provided is correct and true, and if it is, whether it discloses the commission of a cognizable or non-cognizable offence. The police may then proceed further in accordance with law. It is clarified that this order should not be interpreted as mandatory directions for lodging an F.I.R. All that the police are directed to ensure is compliance with the law. Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE
